name: Debounce

unions.name: DebouncerMsg
unions.comment: To bounce the debouncer, just make multiple calls to `Bounce`.

unions.name: DebouncerResults
unions.comment:
Representing either more messages needing to be handled in this component,
    or the message you've been trying to debounce.

values.name: handleDebouncerResults
values.comment:
By being able to convert a `DebouncerMsg` to a message we understand, we
    can turn a whole `DebouncerResults` to a message we understand.
values.type: (DebouncerMsg b -> a) -> DebouncerResults b a -> a

values.name: updateDebouncer
values.comment: The main logic of the debouncer.
values.type: Time -> (b -> a) -> DebouncerMsg b -> Debouncer b -> ( Debouncer b, Cmd (DebouncerResults b a) )
